title: Web App: Anti-Patterns Catalog
description: Web visitor browses the catalog of UI anti-patterns with descriptions and examples at /anti-patterns
use_cases: View Rule Card (id, name, category, description, detection layer, visual example)
Navigate Sections via Sidebar TOC (section name + rule count)
View Gallery of Real-World Specimens (11 items)
use_case_to_actor_map: Web Visitor → Navigate Sections via Sidebar TOC
Web Visitor → Expand 'How to read this' Legend
Web Visitor → View Gallery of Real-World Specimens
Web Visitor → Click into Live Specimen Page
Dev Server (Bun) → Fetch Patterns via API

exports: VISUAL_EXAMPLES: Record<ruleId, inlineHtmlSnippet> — inline preview HTML per rule
GALLERY_ITEMS: Array<{id, title, desc}> — 11 real-world specimens
LLM_ONLY_RULES: Array<{id, category, name, description, skillSection}> — 12 LLM-only rules

key_functions: generateSubPages(rootDir): async — main entry; builds all sub-pages including /anti-patterns
renderAntiPatternsMain(grouped, totalRules): string — renders main column HTML with sections, rule grid, legend
renderAntiPatternsSidebar(grouped): string — renders sidebar TOC with section anchors and rule counts
renderRuleCard(rule): string — renders single rule card (id, name, category badge, layer badge, description, visual example)
groupRulesBySection(rules): {order, bySection} — groups rules by skillSection field
buildSubPageData(rootDir): async — reads all source data; merges detected + LLM-only rules with DETECTION_LAYERS and VISUAL_EXAMPLES
readAntipatternRules(rootDir): Array — parses ANTIPATTERNS array from src/detect-antipatterns.mjs via regex + Function()
scripts/lib/sub-pages-data.js.data_merge: detectedRules (from detect-antipatterns.mjs) enriched with DETECTION_LAYERS[r.id] and VISUAL_EXAMPLES[r.id] → merged with LLM_ONLY_RULES (layer='llm') → unified rules[]

key_functions: generateCounts(rootDir, skills, buildDir): number — counts active commands + detection rules; writes public/js/generated/counts.js; validates HTML references
scripts/build.js.called_from: main build pipeline after skill sync

functions: getPatterns(): async — calls readPatterns(PROJECT_ROOT) → returns {patterns: [], antipatterns: []}

screenshotAntipatterns(): async — reads public/antipattern-examples/*.html; uses Playwright chromium (1200x1200, 2x dpr); navigates to localhost:3000/antipattern-examples/{file}; screenshots .container → public/antipattern-images/{name}.png
checkServer(): async — verifies dev server running at localhost:3000
main(): async — guards with checkServer() then calls screenshotAntipatterns()
scripts/screenshot-antipatterns.js.trigger: run manually as a script; requires dev server running

data_flow: BUILD: readAntipatternRules() parses src/detect-antipatterns.mjs → 26 detected rules
BUILD: buildSubPageData() merges detected rules + LLM_ONLY_RULES + DETECTION_LAYERS + VISUAL_EXAMPLES → unified rules[]
BUILD: renderAntiPatternsSidebar(grouped) + renderAntiPatternsMain(grouped, totalRules) → HTML fragments
BUILD: renderPage({title, description, bodyHtml, activeNav:'anti-patterns', canonicalPath:'/anti-patterns'}) → writes public/anti-patterns/index.html
RUNTIME: GET /anti-patterns → server reads static file → Response(html)
RUNTIME (optional): GET /api/patterns → getPatterns() → readPatterns(PROJECT_ROOT) → JSON {patterns, antipatterns}
SCRIPT: screenshotAntipatterns() → Playwright → public/antipattern-images/{id}.png (used as gallery thumbnails)
key_relationships: build-sub-pages.js imports from content/site/anti-patterns-catalog.js (DETECTION_LAYERS, VISUAL_EXAMPLES, GALLERY_ITEMS, LLM_ONLY_RULES, LAYER_LABELS, LAYER_DESCRIPTIONS)
sub-pages-data.js reads src/detect-antipatterns.mjs at build time (regex parse, no runtime import)
server/index.js imports generateSubPages from build-sub-pages.js (runs at module load for dev)
screenshot-antipatterns.js depends_on public/antipattern-examples/*.html and running dev server
important_notes: The /anti-patterns page is fully static HTML generated at build time (and on server startup for dev). No client-side data fetching occurs for the catalog view. The /api/patterns endpoint is a separate API for programmatic access. GALLERY_ITEMS reference PNG thumbnails shot by screenshot-antipatterns.js and live HTML examples in public/antipattern-examples/. Rule cards show: rule name, AI slop vs Quality category badge, CLI/Browser/LLM-only layer badge, description, and inline visual HTML preview.
